serviceDetails.title: Delhi to Jaipur Luxury Cab

provider.name: GoCabs Luxury
provider.about: GoCabs Luxury is premium cab service provider specializing in inter-city luxury travel. With fleet of Mercedes, BMW, and Audi cars, we ensure your journey is comfortable and stylish. Our professional drivers are trained in hospitality and defensive driving. We operate across North India with 24/7 customer support and real-time tracking. Whether it's business trip or family vacation, we make your travel memorable with complimentary water, WiFi, and entertainment systems. Our commitment to punctuality and safety has made us the preferred choice for corporate clients and families. We also offer customized tour packages with stopovers at popular tourist attractions. Book with us for a hassle-free travel experience with transparent pricing and no hidden charges.

route.bestTimeToTravel: Early morning (6 AM) to avoid traffic

serviceHighlights: Doorstep pickup from any location in Delhi NCR
Professional, uniformed driver with 10+ years experience
Flexible payment options (PayTM, Card, Cash, UPI)
Free cancellation up to 2 hours before trip
Trip insurance included (up to ₹5 lakhs cover)
serviceDetails.description: Comfortable sedan cab from Delhi to Jaipur. Experience royal comfort with our Delhi to Jaipur luxury cab service. Travel in style with our Mercedes Benz E-Class, featuring leather interiors, ambient lighting, and entertainment system. Our professional driver ensures a smooth journey on the Delhi-Jaipur Expressway with planned breaks at scenic locations. Perfect for business travelers, families, and tourists who value comfort and punctuality. The 5.5-hour journey includes optional sightseeing stops at Neemrana Fort and Amer Fort. We provide complimentary WiFi, mineral water, and snacks to make your journey enjoyable. Our cabs are sanitized before every trip and drivers follow strict safety protocols. Whether you're heading to Jaipur for business meeting, wedding, or vacation, our luxury cab service ensures you reach refreshed and relaxed. Book now and experience the difference premium travel makes!
serviceDetails.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 2 hours before scheduled pickup. 50% refund if cancelled between 2 hours and 30 minutes. No refund for cancellations within 30 minutes of pickup or no-show. In case of cab breakdown, we provide alternative cab within 30 minutes or full refund. Bad weather cancellations are fully refundable. To cancel, call our support or use the app.
paymentOptions: EMI options available for bookings above ₹5000

reviews.comment: Best cab service ever! Car was spotless and driver was very professional.
Luxury experience at affordable price. Loved the WiFi and snacks!
Driver was very knowledgeable about Jaipur. Showed us good places.

serviceDetails.seasonalOffers: Summer special: 10% off on bookings before April

serviceDetails.title: Mumbai to Pune Volvo Bus

provider.name: RedBus Premium
provider.about: RedBus Premium is the luxury arm of India's largest bus ticketing platform. We partner with top bus operators to provide Volvo multi-axle buses with amenities like personal entertainment screens, charging points, and onboard washrooms. Our buses feature reclining seats (160 degrees) with ample legroom, making overnight journeys comfortable. We maintain strict hygiene standards with sanitized buses and temperature checks for staff. Real-time bus tracking and 24/7 customer support ensure peace of mind. With 98% on-time performance and professional drivers, we've become the preferred choice for Mumbai-Pune commuters. Our partnership with MSRTC and private operators ensures multiple daily departures. Book with us for guaranteed seats, zero booking fees, and instant cancellation options.

duration.trafficNote: Add 30 mins during peak hours (5 PM - 9 PM)

amenities: Individual AC vents with temperature control
USB charging port at every seat
serviceHighlights: Multiple daily departures (5 AM to 12 AM)
Zero convenience fee on app bookings
Pet policy: Small pets allowed in carriers
Food and beverages available at rest stops
serviceDetails.description: Volvo AC bus with comfortable seating. Experience the most comfortable bus journey between Mumbai and Pune with our Volvo Multi-Axle buses. These modern buses feature push-back seats that recline up to 160 degrees, giving you almost a flat-bed experience for overnight travel. Each seat has its own 7-inch entertainment screen with latest movies, music, and games. The journey takes approximately 3 hours 45 minutes on the Mumbai-Pune Expressway, with one refreshment break at Panvel. Our buses maintain 98% on-time record and are driven by experienced drivers who prioritize safety. The 150 km route offers scenic views of the Western Ghats with 6 tunnels and beautiful valleys. Whether you're a daily commuter, student, or tourist, our Volvo buses provide the perfect balance of comfort and affordability. Book early to get your preferred seat!
serviceDetails.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 4 hours before departure. 75% refund between 4 hours and 1 hour. 50% refund within 1 hour. No refund for no-show. Cancellation fee ₹100 applies for online cancellations. Tickets can be rescheduled for free up to 2 hours before departure (subject to availability). In case of bus breakdown, alternative bus provided within 1 hour or full refund. Weather-related cancellations fully refunded.

reviews.comment: Very comfortable journey. Bus was on time and very clean.
Good service but the entertainment system wasn't working on my seat.
Best bus service on Mumbai-Pune route. Always book with RedBus.

serviceDetails.seasonalOffers: Monsoon special: 20% off on all bookings in July-August

serviceDetails.title: Delhi to Goa Direct Flight

provider.name: IndiGo Airlines
provider.about: IndiGo is India's largest and most preferred airline with a fleet of over 300 aircraft. We operate 1800+ daily flights connecting 85+ domestic and 30+ international destinations. Known for on-time performance, clean aircraft, and friendly service, IndiGo has won numerous awards including 'Best Low-Cost Airline in Central Asia & India' at the Skytrax World Airline Awards. Our Delhi-Goa route is one of our busiest, with 12 daily direct flights. We offer a mix of Airbus A320neo and A321neo aircraft featuring comfortable 3-3 seating with 29-30 inch seat pitch. Our '6E' experience includes hassle-free booking, smooth check-in, and punctual departures. Onboard, you can enjoy our 'Cafe 6E' buy-on-board menu featuring hot meals, snacks, and beverages. We prioritize safety above everything with modern fleet and highly trained crew.

fareTypes.saver: Basic fare with 7kg hand baggage only

amenities: Seatback pocket with safety card and magazine
Clean lavatories with baby changing tables
serviceHighlights: 12 daily direct flights between Delhi and Goa
Most punctual airline in India (85%+ on-time)
Youngest fleet in India (average age 3.5 years)
Seamless web and app booking experience
Self check-in kiosks at all airports
Priority boarding for seniors and families
Pet travel allowed in cabin (small dogs/cats)
serviceDetails.description: Direct flight from Delhi to Goa. Fly non-stop from Delhi to Goa with India's most preferred airline. Our direct flights operate 12 times daily, giving you flexibility to choose morning, afternoon, evening, or red-eye flights. The 2 hour 40 minute journey takes you from the bustling capital to Goa's pristine beaches. Our Airbus A320neo aircraft features comfortable 3-3 seating, large windows for scenic views, and quiet engines for a peaceful flight. As you cross central India, enjoy aerial views of the Vindhyas and Western Ghats before descending into Goa. Onboard, you can purchase snacks, meals, and beverages from our Cafe 6E menu. From traditional Indian snacks to sandwiches and hot meals, there's something for everyone. Our cabin crew ensures your comfort and safety throughout the flight. Whether you're heading to North Goa's party scene or South Goa's serene beaches, start your vacation right with IndiGo.
serviceDetails.cancellationPolicy: Cancellation charges vary by fare type: Saver: Non-refundable; Combo: ₹1500 + fare difference; Flex: Free cancellation up to 4 hours before departure. After 4 hours, Saver and Combo are non-refundable, Flex charges ₹500. Flight cancellations by airline: Full refund or free rescheduling. No-show: No refund. Refund processed within 7-10 working days.

bookingInfo.method: Book online, app, or travel agent
bookingInfo.checkIn: Web check-in opens 48 hours before departure
bookingInfo.baggageAllowance: Saver: 7kg hand baggage; Combo/Flex: 15kg check-in + 7kg hand

reviews.comment: Great flight, on time departure and smooth landing. Crew was very courteous.
Good experience but legroom is a bit tight for tall passengers.
Clean aircraft and professional crew. Snacks were reasonably priced.

serviceDetails.seasonalOffers: Summer sale: Up to 40% off on flights booked for April-June

serviceDetails.title: Manali Royal Enfield Bike Rental

provider.name: Royal Riders Manali
provider.about: Royal Riders Manali is the premier bike rental service in the Himalayas. With a fleet of 200+ Royal Enfield motorcycles including Classic 350, Himalayan, Interceptor 650, and Bullet, we cater to adventure seekers from around the world. Our workshop is staffed by expert mechanics who ensure every bike is in perfect condition before each rental. We offer customized Leh-Ladakh tours, Spiti valley expeditions, and self-drive rentals. Safety is our priority - we provide high-quality riding gear (helmets, jackets, gloves) and 24/7 roadside assistance. Our team of experienced riders conducts pre-ride briefings and shares route knowledge. With 12+ years of Himalayan experience, we've served over 50,000 happy customers. We also arrange accommodations and backup vehicles for group tours. Join us for the ride of a lifetime through the world's highest motorable passes!

route.terrain: High altitude mountains, river crossings, hairpin bends

amenities: Pickup and drop from bus stand/airport
serviceHighlights: Well-maintained bikes serviced after every trip
Option to buy the bike at end of rental
Group tour packages with experienced lead
Ladakh permit included in tour packages
serviceDetails.description: Royal Enfield bike rental for Manali trip. Embark on the ultimate Himalayan adventure with our Royal Enfield bike rentals in Manali. Choose from our fleet of perfectly maintained Royal Enfields - from the thumping Classic 350 to the adventure-ready Himalayan. Whether you're dreaming of conquering the high passes of Ladakh, exploring the stark beauty of Spiti, or just doing a day trip to Rohtang Pass, we have the perfect bike for you. Each rental includes essential riding gear, unlimited kilometers, and 24/7 roadside assistance. Our experienced team provides a thorough pre-ride briefing about routes, weather conditions, and riding tips. We understand the challenges of high-altitude riding and prepare you for every scenario. For first-time riders, we recommend starting with a shorter trip to familiarize yourself with the bike and terrain. Our workshop is open 7 AM to 10 PM for any assistance. Come feel the freedom of the open road with the wind in your hair and the Himalayas as your backdrop!
serviceDetails.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 7 days before pickup. 50% refund between 7 days and 48 hours. No refund within 48 hours. In case of bad weather/road closure, 100% refund or reschedule. Bike breakdown: We provide replacement bike within 24 hours or refund for unused days. Security deposit refunded within 48 hours after bike return inspection. Early return: Refund for unused days subject to re-rental possibility.

reviews.comment: Best bike rental in Manali! The Himalayan was in perfect condition and the team was very helpful with route planning.
International traveler and they made everything easy. Great bikes and amazing support throughout Ladakh trip.
Great experience overall. Bike was well maintained. Suggestion: Include basic tool kit knowledge briefing.

serviceDetails.seasonalOffers: Pre-monsoon special: Free riding jacket with 7+ day rentals

serviceDetails.title: Bangalore to Mysore Cab

provider.name: ZoomCar
provider.about: ZoomCar is India's largest self-drive car rental company. We also offer chauffeur-driven outstation cabs for comfortable inter-city travel. Our fleet includes hatchbacks, sedans, and SUVs maintained to the highest standards. With 24/7 roadside assistance and transparent pricing, we make travel hassle-free.

serviceDetails.description: One-way cab from Bangalore to Mysore. Comfortable sedan with professional driver. Visit Srirangapatna and Mysore Palace enroute. Perfect for day trips and weekend getaways.
serviceDetails.cancellationPolicy: Free cancellation up to 4 hours before. 50% refund after.

reviews.comment: Very smooth ride. Driver knew all the good spots.
